CONSTRAINS._doc: agent -> the rules that bind it (guardrails). mandatoryFull:true = never truncated/excerpted.

USES._doc: agent -> the skills it invokes + tools it operates. Excerptable under budget.

DELEGATES._doc: agent -> doer-agents it hands work to. Add to a profile's pointerRoles to render as a one-line pointer.

REFERENCES._doc: any note -> supporting docs it explicitly cites in frontmatter.

BINDS._doc: hub <- its members. A member note carries `related: [[hub-x]]`; the reverse edge makes members discoverable.

ATTACHES._doc: hub/note -> reference/background notes it hangs off (NOT members). Forward `related:` to a reference-typed endpoint.

NAVIGATES._doc: hub <-> hub composition. A sub-hub declares its PARENT in related (child-declares-parent, like a member declares its hub); the edge is bidirectional so a parent renders its sub-hubs (reverse) and a sub-hub renders its parent (forward). Depth-capped per profile, so a parent shows a sub-hub's map but not its members until fat.

_referenceRoles_doc: Roles trimmed FIRST under a tight token budget, so a hub's own members (BINDS) outlast its references.
